title: WIDTH warning from expression inside array access

features.name: bitwise AND expression in array index
features.description: Code should include a bitwise AND operation used as an array index expression where both operands are 1-bit values

features.name: 2D unpacked array with array indexing
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array accessed with a complex expression involving comparison and bitwise AND

features.name: comparison result used in bitwise AND within array index
features.description: Code should include a comparison expression (NEQ) whose result is used in a bitwise AND within an array index access
